scripts.build: npm run build -w @ce/plugin-types && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run plugins:build
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/server && npm run test -w packages/client && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-sqlite && node --test scripts/lib/kit-path.test.mjs
scripts.kill: lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'ports cleared'
scripts.check: npm run build -w @ce/plugin-types && npm test && npm run plugins:check
